title: PyPI README conversion repair: add Codeberg star CTA to 1,498 monthly downloaders
summary: Wrote and pushed a conversion-optimized PyPI-facing README to the primary Codeberg repo (commit d7cdc101). Built sdist+wheel packages ready for PyPI release. PyPI publish blocked by missing token.

findings.gap: PyPI v0.8.7 README body had ZERO Codeberg links. 1,498 downloads/month (10/day) with no visible star/watch/fork CTA anywhere in the page body — only sidebar project_urls had Repository and Issues links.
findings.root_cause: The marketing-seo-cta-fix branch contained a 199-line conversion-optimized README since May 19 but it was never applied to ralph-workflow/README.md (the PyPI-facing file). Only the repo-root README.md was previously touched (eb5ab122).
findings.prior_art: eb5ab122 commit only changed repo-root README.md (adds PyPI badge, stronger star CTA) — did NOT touch ralph-workflow/README.md
findings.impact: 1,498 monthly pip installers see install instructions but zero Codeberg engagement CTAs

action.description: Applied full 199-line conversion-optimized README to ralph-workflow/README.md from marketing-seo-cta-fix branch content
changes: Added prominent ⭐ Star on Codeberg CTA block at top
Added GitHub mirror mention for secondary tracking
Expanded install section: PyPI, pipx, from-source (Codeberg clone URL)
Added Before your first run, Quick start, What to expect sections
Added product positioning: What you get, When it fits/doesn't fit, Good first tasks, Depth presets
Added Proof before you install section with Example Review Bundle link
Added After Your First Run link for conversion loop closure
Added Where the name comes from section
All 19 referenced doc paths verified to exist on main
action.build: success — sdist + wheel built at dist/ralph_workflow-0.8.8*
action.pypi_publish: blocked — no PYPI_TOKEN in environment, no .pypirc, no keyring, no twine

publish_path.blocker: PyPI token required. Either set PYPI_TOKEN env var or configure hatch auth.

next_steps: User or operator publishes v0.8.8 to PyPI with the token
After publish, verify pypi.org/project/ralph-workflow shows Codeberg star CTA in body
Monitor Codeberg star delta after 7 days to measure conversion improvement

why_this_action.assessment: The distribution_architecture_guard_pause had released (2026-05-28T09:12 vs current 10:49). All curator/comparison/StackOverflow lanes were exhausted or in cooldown. The single highest-leverage genuinely executable action was closing the PyPI→Codeberg conversion gap — 1,498 monthly downloaders seeing zero repo engagement CTAs.
why_this_action.lever: PyPI body text → Codeberg star CTA (0→1 visible CTA, 1,498 downloads/month exposed)
